name: Mochiko Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Chicken (cleaned, boned, and cut into bite-sized pieces)
4 tbsp Mochiko (Sweet rice flour made from glutinous rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients with the chicken pieces in a large bowl and stir well to coat evenly.
2. Marinate for 2–3 hours.
3. Fry the marinated chicken in a large skillet as you would for regular fried chicken until golden brown.
4. Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
